description: Shifts a 3D vector forward along its own direction by a scaled multiple of its length. The vector is translated without rotation.
utility: Shift a 3D vector forward along its direction by a scaled distance.

arguments.name: scalar
arguments.description: Scale factor for the shift distance. Defaults to 1 (shift by the vector's own length)

alternates.description: Shift forward by the vector's own length
Shift forward by scalar times the vector's length

examples.scenario: Shift vector forward by half its length
Shift vector forward by twice its length
